prompt: An anime-style illustration of a cute girl with {argument name="animal ears" default="fluffy dark brown fox ears"} and long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} hair. She is wearing a detailed {argument name="clothing" default="red and white floral kimono with fur trim"} and a floral hair accessory with red tassels. She has a {argument name="expression" default="bright happy smile with a slight blush"} and warm amber eyes, reaching both hands forward towards the viewer in a welcoming hug. The perspective features strong foreshortening on her hands, which are slightly out of focus. The scene is set with {argument name="environment" default="falling snow against a bright white background"}, illuminated by soft, warm, ethereal lighting.
translatedPrompt: 一张动漫风格的插画，主角是一位可爱的少女，长着 {argument name="animal ears" default="毛茸茸的深棕色狐狸耳朵"}，留着一头飘逸的 {argument name="hair color" default="深棕色"} 长发。她身穿一件精致的 {argument name="clothing" default="红白相间的花卉和服，带有毛绒饰边"}，头上戴着带有红色流苏的花卉发饰。她脸上带着 {argument name="expression" default="灿烂幸福的笑容，略显羞涩"}，拥有一双温暖的琥珀色眼睛，双手向前伸向观众，做出欢迎拥抱的姿势。画面采用了强烈的透视效果，突出她伸出的双手，手部略微失焦。场景设定在 {argument name="environment" default="大雪纷飞的背景中，背景明亮洁白"}，在柔和、温暖且空灵的灯光照耀下。

breakdown.creativeCore: 动漫风狐狸少女求抱抱：一个生成动漫风格插画的提示词，描绘了一位身穿和服的狐狸少女在雪中伸手求抱抱的场景。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
